member.name: T:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.EntityUIAction
member.summary: Version history: 6.1.0 - Moved ScreenCondition and SectionCondition to child elements 6.2.0 - Added ActionButtonPlacement.PanelMenu

member.name: T:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.AllowCustomFiltersDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to If true can you send a custom filter and orderings in the request body..

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.DashboardWidgetValueProperty
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Value.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.ErrorAllowCustomFiltersSingleTopEntity
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to {0} can only be enabled when the data structure contains a single top entity..

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.ErrorAllowCustomFiltersSingleTopEntityFieldsOnly
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to The selected data structure can only contain one top entity. Only that entity can select fields. It can have sub entities but these can only be used for filtering..

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.ErrorCompareEntityUIAction
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cannot compare this object with EntityUIAction.

member.name: P:Origam.Schema.GuiModel.Strings.ErrorConstantNotFound
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to DataConstant referenced by '{0}' in {1} '{2}' was not found in the model..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by ControlSetItem.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by EntityModel.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by FormControlSet.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by FormSchemaItemProvider.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by Graphics.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Lookup not set for {0}. Cannot generate user interface..

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to This type is not supported by Report.
